places.name: Flinders Street Station Ballroom
places.description: An abandoned jewel of a ballroom on the top floor of Australia’s busiest rail station echoes with the sounds of a bygone era.

places.name: Wunderkammer
places.description: The word 'wunderkammer' translates as 'wonder-chamber'. This Wunderkammer is both a museum and a retail store.

places.name: Melbourne Storm Tunnels
places.description: The labyrinthine storm tunnels beneath the city of Melbourne are ruled by a band of urban explorers.

places.name: Melbourne GlowGolf Docklands
places.description: Putt your way around Australia in a black light environment.

places.name: Mabu Mabu Big Esso
places.description: Featuring Torres Strait Islander cuisine and Australia's first indigenous bar.
